data.title: Coinbase International has launched AXS, XTZ and EGLD perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the announcement of Coinbase International Station, the AXS-PERP, XTZ-PERP and EGLD-PERP perpetual contract markets have been fully opened for trading on the Coinbase International Exchange and Coinbase Advanced platforms. Users can now use a variety of order types such as limit orders, market orders, stop orders and limit stop orders for trading.

data.title: El Salvador’s official crypto remittance amount is less than 1% of the total remittance amount
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to data from the Reserve Bank of El Salvador, the amount of remittances to the country using cryptocurrencies has accounted for less than 1% of the total amount since October 2024. Its president Nayib Bukele once said that traditional financial institutions charge up to 25% in fees for remittances, while the official digital wallet Chivo can achieve zero fees, but cryptocurrency remittances have failed to gain widespread adoption among the country's dollarized population. Under an agreement with the International Monetary Fund (IMF), the Salvadoran government will terminate or sell Chivo's operations and cancel Bitcoin's legal tender status to reduce Bitcoin's share in its economy.

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-02-06)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $3.22T, down by -0.06% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $96,155 and $99,149 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $98,460, up by 0.69%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading mixed. Market outperformers include QI, STPT, and LAZIO, up by 26%, 12%, and 11%, respectively.

Top stories of the day:

Bitcoin's Negative Funding Rate Suggests Potential Bullish Reversal

Bitcoin Miners' Revenue Surges 41% to $3.7 Billion Amid BTC Price Boom

DeFi Resilience Amid Tariff Crisis: Protocols Like Aave Outperform Traditional Finance

data.title: Trivago Partners with Travala to Enable Crypto Payments
data.description:
With this partnership, Trivago users now have the option to pay for their stays using BTC and ETH. They can also use dozens of other cryptocurrencies. This move opens the door to a new way of booking travel. It makes it easier for crypto enthusiasts to use their digital assets for real-world experiences that accept […]
The post Trivago Partners with Travala to Enable Crypto Payments appeared...
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/trivago-partners-with-travala-to-enable-crypto-payments/

data.title: Cboe BZX Moves To List Ethereum ETF Options Amid Rising Demand
data.description:
Cboe BZX Exchange has proposed an amendment to Rule 19.3 to allow the listing and trading of options on spot Ethereum ETF. The move follows a similar filing by NYSE American, which is pending approval by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The proposal aims to provide investors with additional trading instruments as trading volume […]
The post Cboe BZX Moves To List Ethereum ETF...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/06/cboe-bzx-moves-to-list-ethereum-etf-options-amid-rising-demand/

data.title: French prosecutors say Pavel Durov case won't go to trial for at least a year, settlement talks premature
data.description: Solid Intel published a statement revealing that French prosecutors said the case of Telegram founder Pavel Durov will not go to trial for at least a year, and believed that it is "too early" to negotiate a settlement.

data.title: FDIC heads towards a turning point: US banks may enter the digital asset market
data.description:
The American federal agency is preparing to revise the guidelines that have so far hindered the entry of banking institutions into the cryptocurrency sector.
The post FDIC heads towards a turning point: US banks may enter the digital asset market appeared first on Atlas21.
source: https://atlas21.com/fdic-heads-towards-a-turning-point-us-banks-may-enter-the-digital-asset-market/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=fdic-heads-towards-a-turning-point-us-banks-may-enter-the-digital-asset-market

data.title: A newly created multi-signature wallet withdrew nearly 400 million ALT from Binance 14 minutes ago, equivalent to about 19.82 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a newly created multi-signature wallet withdrew 399,999,000 ALTs, equivalent to US$19.82 million, from Binance 14 minutes ago. The wallet may belong to AltLayer. Yesterday, the wallet withdrew 1,000 ALTs and destroyed them.

data.title: AlphaX releases latest real-time data, AI trading strategy win rate and profit remain at a high level
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official disclosure, after AlphaX was launched on BNB Smart Chain (BSC), it completed a two-month real-time test from December 2024 to January 2025. The entire transaction was independently executed by AI without human intervention, and the data performance is worthy of attention.
Test data shows that AlphaX's winning rate and income in the execution of AI trading strategies remain at a high level:
 •  December 2024: ROI (return on investment) +18.21%, winning rate 89.47%
 •  January 2025: ROI (return on investment) +16.00%, winning rate 92.86%
As the first AI trading model based on the Rena framework under the DeAgentAI ecosystem, AlphaX combines on-chain data analysis, strategy optimization and automated execution to run through AI-driven trading logic in DeFi trading scenarios. Judging from the current real-time data, AI trading not only has high market adaptability, but also the stability of strategy execution is continuously improving.
At present, AlphaX has been tested in the multi-chain DeFi ecosystem, and has cooperated with projects such as Movement, Bitlayer, ai16z, base, GoPlus, etc. to further optimize AI trading strategies and promote the application of DeFAI ecology. In the future, the team will continue to explore the expansion scenarios of AI in intelligent trading and strengthen the optimization of market analysis and risk management.
The market influence of AI trading is gradually expanding, and AlphaX also provides further data support for the feasibility of AI trading agents. More test data and real-time progress, continue to pay attention.
